lines: Yew' usonzey' agakiza, Ng' ubabarirw' ibyaha. Umv' agakuru k'imvaho Yuko Yes' agushaka.
Uhamagawe na Yesu, Na Yesu Mukiza. Aragushak' uyu munsi Mwemerer'
Nawe wabay' inzimizi Kuko wa hunze Yesu, Menya ko yagupfiriye. Ngwin'
Naw' uhamagawe none Wite kur' iryo jwi rye. Reka gutind' uyu munsi. N'uwawe
Harihw abumvis' iri jwi Bararisu zugura, hanyuma bajy' ikuzimu Kimwe na wa
